articles.title: What next as Modi govt's amendment to women's quota law fails Lok Sabha test: The two other bills, and BJP's options now
articles.description: Parliamentary affairs minister Kiren Rijiju said the 3 bills were “intrinsically interrelated”, confirmed that the govt would not proceed with remaining two.

topStories.title: Trump reverses Russia oil stand, renews sanctions waiver for countries to buy Russian crude
topStories.description: The Trump administration renewed a waiver allowing the purchase of Russian oil for another month, amidst criticism that it may bolster economies of sanctioned nations.

topStories.title: US Stock Market: Wall Street indexes hit record highs as oil falls with Strait of Hormuz declared open
topStories.description: Major US stock indices, including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, closed at record highs Friday, fueled by optimism over Iran's decision to open the Strait of Hormuz and potential peace talks with the US. This development eased inflation concerns as oil prices plummeted, boosting consumer discretionary and industrial sectors while energy stocks slid.

topStories.title: "7 Claims In 1 Hour, All False": Iran After Trump's 'Hormuz Blockade' Post
topStories.description: Ghalibaf, in a post on X, asserted that the passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be conducted based on the "designated route" and with "Iranian authorisation".

topStories.description: Oil prices have since surged, squeezing countries and especially those dependent on energy exports from the region.

topStories.description: US President Trump stated the blockade will continue until Iran agrees to a deal, while Iran views the blockade as a ceasefire violation.

topStories.title: SC orders strict vigil to curb illegal mining in Chambal
topStories.description: The Supreme Court ordered strict measures against illegal sand mining in the Chambal Sanctuary, emphasizing accountability and potential paramilitary intervention.

topStories.title: Will Shut Strait Of Hormuz If US Blockade Continues, Warns Iran
topStories.description: Iran will close the strategic Strait of Hormuz again if the United States continues its blockade of Iranian ports, parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said Saturday.

topStories.title: Iran US War LIVE: Hormuz Strait reopens but blockade remains in force — Trump says ‘Iranians want to meet’
topStories.description: Iran US War LIVE: In the ongoing Iran war, mediators are working to bridge differences on three key issues: Iran’s nuclear program, control of the Strait of Hormuz, and compensation for damages caused during the conflict, according to a regional official involved in the talks, AP reported.

dailyNews.title: Man who hacked US Supreme Court filing system sentenced to probation
dailyNews.description: Nicholas Moore hacked into three U.S. government networks using stolen credentials, and then bragged about it and posted victims' personal data on Instagram under the handle @ihackedthegovernment.

dailyNews.description: The president is set to read 2 Chronicles 7 during the 'America Reads the Bible' event, a passage organizers say was deliberately reserved for him.

dailyNews.title: RFK Jr clashes with Dem lawmaker over Trump’s mental fitness in heated exchange
dailyNews.description: RFK Jr. defended Trump's mental health during a tense congressional hearing, rejecting calls for a fitness assessment or invoking the 25th Amendment.

dailyNews.title: Trump says first releases from Pentagon UFO study will come out 'very, very soon' after Phoenix rally tease
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the first releases from a Pentagon study on UFOs will come out "very, very soon," teasing interesting documents found by officials.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Urged to Move on Nuclear Site Thought to Be Beyond Reach of Bombs
dailyNews.description: Little is known about Pickaxe Mountain, but some experts say it illustrates the impossibility of relying on force alone to prevent Iran from acquiring a nuclear bomb.

dailyNews.title: Trump Extends Sanctions Exemption on Some Russian Oil as High Gas Prices Persist
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration made the announcement hours after Iran said that the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial ships.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Dispute With Pope Leo Deepens Divisions on the Right
dailyNews.description: Sean Hannity criticized the pope. Tucker Carlson attacked Mr. Hannity. And President Trump suggested ranking MAGA figures: “good, bad, and somewhere in the middle.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Will Participate in a Marathon Bible Reading
dailyNews.description: He will read a passage from the Old Testament that his Christian supporters cite as a call to national repentance and divine blessing.

dailyNews.title: In Phoenix, Trump Eyes Lower Gas Prices and Frets About the Midterms
dailyNews.description: President Trump told a crowd of supporters that the price of oil and gas was coming down, part of an effort in recent days to present a rosier picture of the nearly two-month-long Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Prosecutor Withdraws From Trump Team’s Investigation of Ex-CIA Director John O. Brennan
dailyNews.description: A career Justice Department lawyer, Maria Medetis Long, in Miami is said to have raised concerns about whether the evidence justified moving forward with a bid to prosecute John O. Brennan.

dailyNews.title: White House and Anthropic Hold ‘Productive’ Meeting, Aiming for a Compromise
dailyNews.description: Friday’s meeting at the White House followed the introduction of Anthropic’s powerful new artificial intelligence model, Mythos, which U.S. officials believe could be critical for security.
